sn12.64:1.2: “There are these four nutriments for the maintenance of beings who have come into being or for the support of those in search of a place to be born.
sn12.64:1.4: Physical food, gross or refined; contact as the second, intellectual intention the third, and consciousness the fourth.
sn12.64:1.5: These are the four nutriments for the maintenance of beings who have come into being or for the support of those in search of a place to be born.
sn12.64:2.1: “Where there is passion, delight, & craving for the nutriment of physical food, consciousness lands there and increases.
sn12.64:2.2: Where consciousness lands and increases, there is the alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:2.3: Where there is the alighting of name-&-form, there is the growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:2.4: Where there is the growth of fabrications, there is the production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:2.5: Where there is the production of renewed becoming in the future, there is future birth, aging, & death,
sn12.64:2.6: together, I tell you, with sorrow, affliction, & despair.
sn12.64:3.1: “Where there is passion, delight, & craving for the nutriment of contact.…
sn12.64:3.2: “Where there is passion, delight, & craving for the nutriment of intellectual intention.…
sn12.64:3.3: “Where there is passion, delight, & craving for the nutriment of consciousness, consciousness lands there and increases.
sn12.64:3.4: Where consciousness lands and increases, there is the alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:3.5: Where there is the alighting of name-&-form, there is the growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:3.6: Where there is the growth of fabrications, there is the production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:3.7: Where there is the production of renewed becoming in the future, there is future birth, aging, & death,
sn12.64:3.8: together, I tell you, with sorrow, affliction, & despair.
sn12.64:4.1: “ Just as—when there is dye, lac, yellow orpiment, indigo, or crimson—a dyer or painter would paint the picture of a woman or a man, complete in all its parts, on a well-polished panel or wall, or on a piece of cloth;
sn12.64:4.2: in the same way, where there is passion, delight, & craving for the nutriment of physical food…
sn12.64:5.3: consciousness, consciousness lands there and increases.
sn12.64:5.4: Where consciousness lands and increases, there is the alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:5.5: Where there is the alighting of name-&-form, there is the growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:5.6: Where there is the growth of fabrications, there is the production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:5.7: Where there is the production of renewed becoming in the future, there is future birth, aging, & death,
sn12.64:5.8: together, I tell you, with sorrow, affliction, & despair.
sn12.64:6.1: “Where there is no passion for the nutriment of physical food, where there is no delight, no craving, then consciousness does not land there or increase.
sn12.64:6.2: Where consciousness does not land or increase, there is no alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:6.3: Where there is no alighting of name-&-form, there is no growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:6.4: Where there is no growth of fabrications, there is no production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:6.5: Where there is no production of renewed becoming in the future, there is no future birth, aging, & death.
sn12.64:6.6: That, I tell you, has no sorrow, affliction, or despair.
sn12.64:7.1: “Where there is no passion for the nutriment of contact.…
sn12.64:7.2: “Where there is no passion for the nutriment of intellectual intention.…
sn12.64:7.3: “Where there is no passion for the nutriment of consciousness, where there is no delight, no craving, then consciousness does not land there or increase.
sn12.64:7.4: Where consciousness does not land or increase, there is no alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:7.5: Where there is no alighting of name-&-form, there is no growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:7.6: Where there is no growth of fabrications, there is no production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:7.7: Where there is no production of renewed becoming in the future, there is no future birth, aging, & death.
sn12.64:7.8: That, I tell you, has no sorrow, affliction, or despair.
sn12.64:8.1: “ Just as if there were a roofed house or a roofed hall having windows on the north, the south, or the east. When the sun rises, and a ray has entered by way of the window, where does it land?”
sn12.64:8.3: “And if there is no western wall, where does it land?”
sn12.64:8.5: “And if there is no ground, where does it land?”
sn12.64:8.7: “And if there is no water, where does it land?”
sn12.64:8.9: “In the same way, where there is no passion for the nutriment of physical food…
sn12.64:9.3: consciousness, where there is no delight, no craving, then consciousness does not land there or increase.
sn12.64:9.4: Where consciousness does not land or increase, there is no alighting of name-&-form.
sn12.64:9.5: Where there is no alighting of name-&-form, there is no growth of fabrications.
sn12.64:9.6: Where there is no growth of fabrications, there is no production of renewed becoming in the future.
sn12.64:9.7: Where there is no production of renewed becoming in the future, there is no future birth, aging, & death.
sn12.64:9.8: That, I tell you, has no sorrow, affliction, or despair.”
